content: Prisma DateTime range filtering uses gte/lte operators on DateTime fields. Example: where: { createdAt: { gte: new Date('2026-06-01T00:00:00.000Z'), lte: new Date('2026-06-30T23:59:59.999Z') } }. For user-supplied date strings from HTML input[type=date] (YYYY-MM-DD format): gte: new Date(from + 'T00:00:00.000Z'), lte: new Date(to + 'T23:59:59.999Z'). The to date must use T23:59:59.999Z to include all records on that day. Both operators can be omitted when the filter value is absent (undefined check).
